---
title: "Test RMarkdown"
author: "Test"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## 基本计算

```{r basic}
# 简单数学运算
x <- 1:10
mean(x)
sum(x)
```

## 数据框操作

```{r dataframe}
# 创建一个简单数据框
df <- data.frame(
  species = c("Dog", "Cat", "Bird", "Fish"),
  weight  = c(20, 4, 0.5, 0.1),
  legs    = c(4, 4, 2, 0)
)

df
```

## 简单绘图

```{r plot}
# 使用内置数据集绘图
plot(cars$speed, cars$dist,
     xlab = "Speed (mph)",
     ylab = "Stopping Distance (ft)",
     main = "Car Speed vs. Stopping Distance",
     pch  = 19, col = "steelblue")
```
